instructions.name: Transfer
expected_state_changes: debits accounts.source token balance by data.amount
credits accounts.destination token balance by data.amount
risk_rules: authority must be signer and match source account's delegated authority or owner
amount must not exceed source balance
RISK: large transfers to new/dormant accounts should be flagged

instructions.name: InitializeMint
expected_state_changes: initializes mint account with decimals, mint_authority, freeze_authority
risk_rules: mint must not already be initialized

instructions.name: MintTo
expected_state_changes: credits accounts.account token balance by data.amount
risk_rules: RISK: minting to unrelated accounts should be flagged for review
RISK: unlimited mint authority should be flagged

instructions.name: Burn
expected_state_changes: debits accounts.account token balance by data.amount
risk_rules: authority must be signer and match account's delegated authority or owner

instructions.name: Approve
expected_state_changes: sets accounts.source delegated_amount to data.amount for accounts.delegate
risk_rules: RISK: approving large amounts should be flagged

instructions.name: SetAuthority
expected_state_changes: changes authority (owner, mint_authority, freeze_authority) of accounts.account_or_mint
risk_rules: RISK: AUTHORITY_HIJACK — this instruction changes who controls the account. Always flag if called by unexpected authority.
RISK: setting authority to system program (all zeros) effectively burns the account
RISK: setting freeze_authority should be flagged separately from mint_authority

instructions.name: CloseAccount
expected_state_changes: closes accounts.account, transfers remaining lamports to accounts.destination
risk_rules: RISK: DRAIN — closing account sends all lamports to destination, verify destination is expected
